block.securitycraft.reinforced_light_gra: Reinforced Light Grey Stained Glass Pane
The Block Pocket Manager is used to manage the Block Pocket, which is a room that only its owner and players on the allowlist can enter. The Block Pocket can have multiple sizes that can be selected through the block's GUI. After choosing a size, the structure can be built manually or auto-assembled if the necessary blocks are present. Make sure that the manager is placed on the outside of the bottom layer. The corners of the structure are built with Reinforced Chiselled Crystal Quartz, the edges are built with correctly oriented Reinforced Crystal Quartz Pillars, and the faces are filled in with Block Pocket Walls. Clicking "Activate" after the structure is built will activate it. After activation, only the owner and allowlisted players are able to enter the structure.
help.securitycraft.reinforced_chiseled_b: The Reinforced Chiselled Bookshelf has the same features as its vanilla counterpart, though only the owner and players on the allowlist can add and remove books.
module.securitycraft.reinforced_chiseled: Adding an allowlist module to a Reinforced Chiselled Bookshelf will allow listed players to interact with the Reinforced Chiselled Bookshelf.
